# Abstract Construction LLC

> Abstract Construction LLC is a licensed and insured commercial and industrial general contractor serving the St. Louis, MO metro and Metro East Illinois. The company specializes in warehouse construction, office buildouts, tenant improvements, and industrial design build projects, with in-house structural steel fabrication, welding, framing, drywall, and finish carpentry crews. Phone: (618) 771-0767. Rated 5.0 on Google.

Last updated: 2026-07-21

Key facts (as of 2026):
- Service area: St. Louis City and County, St. Charles County, St. Clair County, and Madison County (Missouri and Illinois)
- Typical St. Louis commercial fit-out cost: $80 to $250 per square foot
- Typical ground-up commercial build cost: $200 to $500 per square foot
- Warehouse construction: $60 to $140 per square foot for pre-engineered metal buildings; $120 to $250 per square foot for conventional steel or tilt-up
- Typical warehouse timeline: 6 to 12 months from permits to occupancy; interior fit-outs 2 to 4 months
- Self-performs structural steel, welding, framing, drywall, and finish carpentry (fewer subcontractor markups, tighter schedules)
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 7am to 5pm Central

## Services
- [Commercial Construction](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/commercial-construction-st-louis/): Ground-up builds, office buildouts, and commercial general contracting in St. Louis
- [Warehouse Construction](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/warehouse-construction-st-louis/): Ground-up warehouses, expansions, mezzanines, and industrial fit-outs
- [Industrial Design Build](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/industrial-design-build-st-louis/): Single-contract design and construction for industrial facilities
- [Tenant Improvements](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/tenant-improvements-st-louis/): Office, retail, restaurant, and medical fit-outs
- [Commercial Design Build](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/commercial-design-build-st-louis/): Design-build delivery for commercial projects
- [Commercial Remodeling](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/commercial-remodeling-st-louis/): Renovation of existing commercial spaces
- [General Contractor](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/general-contractor-st-louis/): Licensed general contracting in Missouri and Illinois
- [Mobile Welding](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/mobile-welding-st-louis/): On-site structural welding and steel repair
- [Building Maintenance](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/building-maintenance-st-louis/): Commercial property upkeep and repairs

- [About](https://www.abstractconstructionllc.com/about/): Company background and team
